description: A universal load calls a browser-only API, crashing during server-side rendering.
body: Failure mode: a +page.js universal load references window, document, or localStorage, which are undefined on the server, so SSR throws and the route fails to render. Detection signals: an SSR error referencing an undefined browser global; the route works in the SPA but errors on full reload; browser objects appear in a universal (non-.server) load. Do not access browser APIs in code that runs during SSR. Safer fallback: move browser-only work to onMount or a client-guarded branch, keep universal loads to serializable data fetched via the injected fetch, and use +page.server.js for anything server-bound.
